properties.entry: DELETE FROM BQMembership WHERE BQMembership.individualSegmentId IN (:individualSegmentIds)

SELECT BQMembership.individualId FROM BQMembership WHERE BQMembership.individualId IN (:individualIds) AND BQMembership.individualSegmentId = :individualSegmentId AND BQMembership.status = :status GROUP BY BQMembership.individualId ORDER BY COUNT(BQMembership.individualId) DESC, BQMembership.individualId ASC

SELECT BQMembership.individualId FROM BQMembership WHERE BQMembership.individualSegmentId = :individualSegmentId AND BQMembership.status = :status GROUP BY BQMembership.individualId ORDER BY COUNT(BQMembership.individualId) DESC, BQMembership.individualId ASC

SELECT BQMembership.individualSegmentId FROM BQMembership WHERE BQMembership.individualId = :individualId AND BQMembership.status = :status GROUP BY BQMembership.individualSegmentId ORDER BY COUNT(BQMembership.individualSegmentId) DESC, BQMembership.individualSegmentId ASC

SELECT BQMembership.individualSegmentId FROM BQMembership WHERE BQMembership.individualId IN (:individualIds) AND BQMembership.status = :status GROUP BY BQMembership.individualSegmentId ORDER BY COUNT(BQMembership.individualSegmentId) DESC, BQMembership.individualSegmentId ASC

SELECT BQMembership.individualSegmentId FROM BQMembership WHERE BQMembership.individualId = :individualId GROUP BY BQMembership.individualSegmentId ORDER BY COUNT(BQMembership.individualSegmentId) DESC, BQMembership.individualSegmentId ASC LIMIT 20
